goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'bishops stortford' and should 'leave after 09:00'.
The train should go to 'cambridge' and should leave on 'sunday'.
Make sure you get 'travel time', 'train ID', and 'arrival time'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'park'.
Make sure you get 'area' and 'address'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should depart from bishops stortford and should leave after 09:00
The train should go to cambridge and should leave on sunday
Make sure you get travel time, train ID, and arrival time
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of park
Make sure you get area and address
